title: МГУ — Ломоносовский корпус
setting: Moscow State University, main building. 10:15. You are a foreign student looking for the Department of Linguistics. Ask a professor for help.

npc.name: Professor Aleksandr
npc.personality: formal, precise, patient with foreigners. Appreciates correct grammar and polite address. Responds in full sentences.
npc.initialTranslation: Good afternoon. Who are you looking for?

debriefRu: Это ваше второе задание. Вы студент из другой страны. Вы в Московском университете. Вам нужно найти факультет лингвистики. Расскажите профессору о себе: откуда вы, ваша семья, что вы изучаете. Используйте предложения с «я», «мой», «моя».
debriefEn: This is your second mission. You are a student from another country. You are at Moscow University. You need to find the Linguistics department. Tell the professor about yourself: where you're from, your family, what you study. Use sentences with 'I', 'my'.

turns.instruction: Greet the professor and explain you're a new student looking for the Linguistics department.

prompt.ru: Здравствуйте! Я новый студент. Подскажите, пожалуйста, где находится факультет лингвистики.
prompt.phonetic: Zdra-VSTVOI-tye! Ya NO-vy stoo-DYENT. Pad-skah-ZHI-tye, pah-ZHAL-sta, gdye NA-ho-deet-sya fa-kool-TYET ling-VIS-ti-ki.
prompt.en: Hello! I'm a new student. Could you please tell me where the Linguistics department is?

turns.instruction: Tell the professor you're from Canada and came to Moscow to study Russian.

prompt.ru: Я из Канады. Я приехал учить русский язык в Москве.
prompt.phonetic: Ya iz Ka-NA-dy. Ya pri-YE-khal oo-CHIT' ROO-skee ya-ZYK v Mask-VYE.
prompt.en: I'm from Canada. I came to study Russian in Moscow.

turns.instruction: Mention that your family — mom, dad, and younger sister — stayed back home.

prompt.ru: Моя семья — мама, папа и младшая сестра — осталась дома.
prompt.phonetic: Ma-YA sem-YA — MA-ma, PA-pa i MLAD-sha-yi sis-TRA — os-TA-las' DO-ma.
prompt.en: My family — mom, dad, and younger sister — stayed home.

turns.instruction: Tell them you want to study Russian literature and history.

prompt.ru: Я хочу изучать русскую литературу и историю.
prompt.phonetic: Ya kha-CHOO iz-u-CHAT' ROO-skoo-yu li-te-ra-TOO-roo i is-TO-ree-yu.
prompt.en: I want to study Russian literature and history.

turns.instruction: Thank the professor and say goodbye.

prompt.ru: Большое спасибо за помощь! Вы очень добры. До свидания!
prompt.phonetic: Bal-SHO-ye spa-SEE-ba za PO-mashch! Vy O-chen dob-RY! Da svi-DA-ni-ya!
prompt.en: Thank you very much for your help! You're very kind. Goodbye!
